# llms.txt for raspb.de
# https://raspb.de

## About raspb

raspb is a German digital solutions provider specializing in web development, CMS solutions, and AI services for small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs), associations, and foundations. We combine enterprise-quality technology with transparent, affordable pricing.

## Core Offering

### Web Development
- **Custom Websites** - From simple one-pagers to complex web applications
- **CMS Solutions** - Headless CMS with Hygraph, content management systems
- **E-Commerce** - Online shops with modern payment integration
- **Progressive Web Apps** - Mobile-first, offline-capable applications

### AI Services
- **AI Agent Development** - Custom AI agents for business automation
- **Business OS** - AI-powered operating system for SMEs
- **Process Automation** - Streamline workflows with intelligent automation
- **Data Analytics** - AI-driven insights from your business data

### Technical Services
- **Hosting & Infrastructure** - Managed hosting on Netlify, Vercel, custom servers
- **Domain & DNS** - Complete domain management
- **Security & Compliance** - DSGVO (GDPR), SSL, security audits
- **Monitoring & Support** - 24/7 monitoring, proactive maintenance

## Technology Stack

### Frontend
- **SvelteKit** - Modern, fast, reactive framework
- **Svelte 5** - Latest version with runes and fine-grained reactivity
- **Tailwind CSS** - Utility-first CSS framework
- **DaisyUI** - Component library for Tailwind

### Backend
- **Node.js** - JavaScript runtime
- **GraphQL** - API with Hygraph CMS
- **REST APIs** - Custom API endpoints

### Infrastructure
- **Netlify** - Static site hosting and serverless functions
- **Vercel** - Edge functions and serverless
- **Custom Servers** - Dedicated infrastructure for complex projects

### AI & ML
- **OpenAI** - GPT models for AI features
- **Anthropic** - Claude for advanced AI capabilities
- **Local Models** - Self-hosted AI for data privacy

## The raspb Philosophy

### "Perfectly Balanced"
We believe successful projects require the optimal balance between:
- **Time** - Fast implementation through agile methods and AI support
- **Costs** - Transparent fixed prices without hidden fees
- **Quality** - Enterprise standards at SME prices

### Key Differentiators
1. **10× Faster** - Compared to traditional project workflows
2. **Transparent Pricing** - Fixed prices, no surprises
3. **Single Point of Contact** - From architecture to hosting
4. **Enterprise Quality** - Lighthouse scores >95, security, GDPR compliance
5. **AI-Powered Development** - Leveraging AI for faster, better results

## Pricing Model

- **Fixed Prices** - No hourly billing, no surprises
- **Entry-Level** - From €399 for simple web presences
- **Mid-Range** - €2,000-10,000 for CMS and business apps
- **Enterprise** - Custom pricing for complex solutions
- **No Subscription Fees** - You own what you pay for

## Target Customers

- **SMEs** - Small and medium-sized enterprises
- **Associations** - Vereine and non-profits
- **Foundations** - Stiftungen and charitable organizations
- **Startups** - From MVP to scale-up
- **Enterprise** - Division-level solutions

## Business OS (New Focus)

The raspb Business OS is an AI-powered operating system designed to:
- **Centralize Operations** - Single platform for all business processes
- **Automate Routines** - AI agents handling repetitive tasks
- **Provide Insights** - Real-time analytics and reporting
- **Scale Flexibly** - Grow from startup to enterprise

## Content Strategy

### Blog & Insights
- Technical deep-dives on web development
- AI use cases for SMEs
- Case studies and success stories
- Industry-specific solutions

### Resources
- Documentation and guides
- API references
- Best practices
- Tool comparisons

- "Enterprise Quality at SME Prices"
